title: Inka
description: Face the mighty final boss of the Andes and uncover an ancient story full of mysteries and challenges. Only the bravest will conquer the peak!
body:
![Inka need Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bce891803d338778d18f8accbf19931aa05d7600.png)
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib
Discover the Ancient Inca Empire
Explore the rich culture of the Inca Empire in this unique Minecraft mod, where history and fantasy merge. Encounter both creatures that roamed the lands during the time of the Incas and new, mythical beings.

Immerse Yourself in Inca Culture

Viraicocha, the God of the Sun (Biome Desert)
Viraicocha, supreme creator of the Incas, emerges from the heart of the desert, where its ancient structure rests as an echo of sacred times. To confront him, find his temple and use your ceremonial TUMI on the golden block in the center. But beware, awakening this ancient god will unleash his wrath: devastating short and long range attacks that few can survive. Only the bravest dare to invoke the fury of the sun.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/194c483d86c3002187a6d4daef2b539dbdfd651c.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/293739276a25f7386696673d7c741ef66c3758a7.png)
Capac and Head Clava (Biome Plains)
Beware of Capac and his mighty Golem, Head Clava. They are neutral entities, but if you provoke them, they will retaliate! Defeat Capac to obtain the powerful "Tumi," an item that acts like a Totem of Undying, giving you a second chance at life. Inside Capac's house, you'll also find the Coca Leaf, a special food that cures all negative effects like poison and blindness, and grants healing powers.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/849f793560b9be18f1bdd302d06bc462234f4b6d.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8a2cce8948164e8d89fcf738fb6d4b3ef9e72dc.png)
Inca Warriors (Biome Savanna)
Explore the homes of the Inca warriors, who remain neutral unless attacked. Be careful, as they will all unite to defend themselves if threatened. In their house, you can find the Zamponia, a musical instrument that plays a beautiful melody, encouraging your crops to flourish. You'll also discover Tocosh, a food that bestows positive effects.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ad325f9d2f8b35c3d3d664e506a7243150c7535.png)
Apu Inti, the Ceramic Golem
Create your own guardian by crafting Apu Inti, a ceramic golem. To do so, place a clay brick block, a pumpkin, and right-click the pumpkin with the Tumi. Apu Inti will protect you and can wield melee weapons. You can also sit him down to serve as a statue that holds your items, staying in place until you need him.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d17d9a6c1d222b32d8cc909f6988fe96a19b5f0d.png)
Use your Huaco Retrato to dive deeper into the Inca world, and let the rich history and vibrant traditions of this ancient civilization come to life in your Minecraft adventures!
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac9df9f74fa1272599d7b66b5b2018c876af324c.png)
Recipes:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bdaef7cbd804806fd26ce4f47b778d2b5789b74.png)
Zampoña
Let the Inca melody flow from your zampoña, an ancient harmony that evokes the sacred connection with Pachamama. Each note awakens the essence of the earth, causing the plants around you to grow vigorous and full of life. This song of the past not only embellishes the present, but nourishes the world with the strength of the ancients
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2034344fbf81ac3d2385fcbace5dba7fd40fca61.png)
Cuy
Small rodents emblematic of the Andean lands, these guinea pigs appear in three variants: black, white and a charming mix of brown and white. They represent the diversity of local fauna and are a basic food source. When hunted, they leave raw food that, although not cookable, can be key to surviving in extreme situations.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cb30dfdcc87a1efe76d5e4f1001c84a6baaec88.png)
